product_overview: Dental Lab ERP is a comprehensive Enterprise Resource Planning system tailored for dental laboratories to streamline operations including order management, client tracking, financials, and user administration.
core_goals: Provide an integrated platform to manage dental lab operations efficiently.
Enable real-time tracking and status updates of dental orders.
Support role-based access control to ensure data security and appropriate permissions.
Offer detailed financial management including transactions, expenses, and invoicing.
Facilitate management of doctors, staff, and system users through dedicated modules.
key_features: Authentication system supporting login, logout, and role-based access control.
Main dashboard displaying lab performance metrics, order alerts, and workload summaries.
Order management module for creating, updating, filtering, and tracking dental lab orders.
Doctor management features for maintaining doctor profiles and preferences.
Financial management capabilities covering transactions, accounts, and expenses.
User management interface for administration of system users and roles.
user_flow_summary: User logs in through the authentication system, with role-based access determining available features.
Users are directed to the main dashboard presenting key metrics, alerts, and workload information.
From the dashboard, users navigate to order management to create or update orders and filter by status or role.
Users access doctor management to add or edit client/doctor profiles and manage preferences.
Finance module allows users to monitor transactions, manage expenses, and generate invoices.
Admins use the user management section to add, modify, or remove system users and assign roles.
validation_criteria: Authentication processes correctly restrict access based on user roles.
Dashboard accurately displays up-to-date statistics and alerts for orders and lab workload.
Order management functions (create, update, filter) operate robustly and data syncs correctly with backend.
Doctor profile and preferences management persist changes reliably.
Financial transactions, expenses, and invoices are recorded and retrieved accurately.
User management changes are reflected immediately and enforce role-based permissions effectively.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login, logout, and role-based access control.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard showing statistics, order tracking alerts (Late, Rejected, etc.), and lab workload.

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Create, update, and manage dental lab orders. Includes filtering by status and role.

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin interface to manage system users and roles.
